text: Here, at the edge of the world, a writer finds her other half dying.
The great dragon Viridian, who scales once held the light of deep forests,
His breath is smoke and ruin.
Kalen sees not just a sickness in his body, but a fading in his soul,
a color leaching from their shared sky.
This is an ancient melody, one that whispers of an ending.
But she is a writer. They do not accept endings.
